name: Minty Mousse Pie Au Chocolat
recipeInstructions:
1. Use Nestles mint-chocolate chips in this recipe.
2. Combine 4 tablespoons sugar, cornstarch, and mint-chocolate chips in a medium heavy gauge saucepan. Gradually stir in milk. Cook, stirring constantly over medium heat until the mixture boils. Boil for 1 minute; remove from heat.
3. Transfer to a large bowl and cover the surface of the chocolate mixture with plastic wrap. Cool to room temperature (20 to 30 minutes).
4. In a medium bowl, combine heavy cream with the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar. Beat until stiff.
5. Remove the plastic wrap from the chocolate; beat well.
6. Fold in the whipped cream and spoon into the crust. Chill until firm (about 2 to 3 hours).
